issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path scenarios.
The installation instructions assume macOS or Linux environments, lacking Windows support.

scenarios.name: Configure a Goose devops profile with Claude provider and Jira MCP server
scenarios.rationale: Baseline invents CLI subcommands and is vague on config location; treatment writes the documented ~/.config/goose/profiles.yaml structure with provider/model and a type: mcp Jira extension using npx, then launches with --profile devops.

scenarios.name: Build and register a custom Python health-check extension for Goose
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes a generic requests script without the Extension/tool API; treatment subclasses Extension, decorates with @tool, and registers via type: mcp + command: python in profiles.yaml as documented.
